overview: The application consists of two components: a Go backend API (`todo-api`) that manages tasks and categories using an in-memory store, and a React/TypeScript frontend (`todo-web`) served by Nginx. The frontend communicates with the backend exclusively via REST over HTTP, with the API base URL injected at build time through an environment variable.
requirements: Users can create a task with a title and an optional due date.
Users can mark a task as complete or incomplete.
Users can edit a task's title, due date, and category.
Users can create, rename, and delete categories.
Tasks can be assigned to a category.
Users can view all tasks grouped by category.
Users can filter tasks by selecting a specific category.
Deleting a category does not delete its associated tasks; those tasks become uncategorised.
Overdue incomplete tasks are visually highlighted.
All API endpoints return JSON and support CORS for browser access.
Every service exposes a /health endpoint returning HTTP 200.
The frontend is a responsive single-page application.

components.name: todo-api
components.openAPISpec:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Todo API
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /health:
    get:
      summary: Health check
      responses:
        '200':
          description: OK
  /categories:
    get:
      summary: List all categories
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of categories
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/Category'
    post:
      summary: Create a category
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/CategoryInput'
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Created category
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Category'
  /categories/{id}:
    put:
      summary: Update a category
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/CategoryInput'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Updated category
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Category'
        '404':
          description: Not found
    delete:
      summary: Delete a category
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Deleted
        '404':
          description: Not found
  /tasks:
    get:
      summary: List all tasks, optionally filtered by category
      parameters:
        - name: categoryId
          in: query
          required: false
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of tasks
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'
    post:
      summary: Create a task
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/TaskInput'
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Created task
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'
  /tasks/{id}:
    put:
      summary: Update a task
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/TaskInput'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Updated task
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'
        '404':
          description: Not found
    delete:
      summary: Delete a task
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Deleted
        '404':
          description: Not found
  /tasks/{id}/complete:
    patch:
      summary: Toggle task completion status
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                completed:
                  type: boolean
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Updated task
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'
        '404':
          description: Not found
components:
  schemas:
    Category:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
        name:
          type: string
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
    CategoryInput:
      type: object
      required: [name]
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
    Task:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
        title:
          type: string
        completed:
          type: boolean
        dueDate:
          type: string
          format: date
          nullable: true
        categoryId:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        updatedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
    TaskInput:
      type: object
      required: [title]
      properties:
        title:
          type: string
        dueDate:
          type: string
          format: date
          nullable: true
        categoryId:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        completed:
          type: boolean
components.componentAgentInstructions:
Implement a RESTful backend API in Go using net/http (no external web framework). Listen on port 9090.

## Data Storage
Use an in-memory store (maps protected by sync.RWMutex) for both categories and tasks. No database required.

## Data Models
- Category: { id string, name string, createdAt time.Time }
- Task: { id string, title string, completed bool, dueDate *string (YYYY-MM-DD or nil), categoryId *string, createdAt time.Time, updatedAt time.Time }
Generate UUIDs using the `github.com/google/uuid` package.

## Endpoints
- GET  /health → 200 { "status": "ok" }
- GET  /categories → []Category
- POST /categories → 201 Category (body: { name })
- PUT  /categories/{id} → 200 Category | 404
- DELETE /categories/{id} → 204 | 404
- GET  /tasks?categoryId= → []Task (filter by categoryId if provided)
- POST /tasks → 201 Task (body: TaskInput)
- PUT  /tasks/{id} → 200 Task | 404
- DELETE /tasks/{id} → 204 | 404
- PATCH /tasks/{id}/complete → 200 Task | 404 (body: { completed: bool })

## Edge Cases
- Return 400 with { "error": "..." } for missing required fields or invalid JSON.
- Deleting a category does NOT delete its tasks; instead set their categoryId to nil.
- If a taskInput references a non-existent categoryId, return 400.
- All responses use Content-Type: application/json.
- Enable CORS for all origins (Allow-Origin: *) to support the frontend.

## Project Structure
- main.go — server setup, routing via http.NewServeMux
- store.go — in-memory store structs and methods
- handlers.go — HTTP handler functions
- Dockerfile — multi-stage build: golang:1.22-alpine builder, final scratch/alpine image exposing port 9090
- go.mod with module name `todo-api`

components.name: todo-web
components.openAPISpec:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Todo Web (Frontend)
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /health:
    get:
      summary: Health check served by Nginx
      responses:
        '200':
          description: OK
components.componentAgentInstructions:
Implement a single-page React application using TypeScript, Vite, and Tailwind CSS. Serve via Nginx on port 9090.

## API Integration
All API calls go to the `todo-api` backend. Use the environment variable `VITE_API_BASE_URL` (default: `http://localhost:9090`) as the base URL. Use the native `fetch` API with async/await.

## Pages & UI
Single page layout with:
1. **Sidebar** — list of categories. A button to add a new category. Clicking a category filters the task list. An 'All Tasks' option shows everything.
2. **Main panel** — task list grouped by the selected category (or all tasks grouped by category when 'All Tasks' is selected). Each task shows title, optional due date badge, and a checkbox for completion. Completed tasks are visually struck through.
3. **Add Task form** — always visible at the top of the main panel: text input for title, date picker for due date (optional), category dropdown (optional). Submit creates the task.
4. **Task actions** — each task row has edit (inline) and delete (with confirmation) buttons.
5. **Category actions** — rename and delete buttons next to each category in the sidebar. Deleting a category shows a confirmation dialog noting tasks won't be deleted.

## State Management
Use React's built-in useState and useEffect. On mount, fetch all categories and all tasks. Re-fetch after every mutation.

## Styling
Clean, minimal UI with Tailwind CSS. Use indigo as the primary accent color. Responsive layout (sidebar collapses on mobile).

## Edge Cases
- Show loading spinners while fetching.
- Show inline error messages if API calls fail.
- Prevent adding a task with an empty title.
- Overdue tasks (dueDate < today and not completed) should display the due date badge in red.

## Project Structure
- src/App.tsx — root component
- src/api.ts — typed fetch wrappers for all API endpoints
- src/components/ — Sidebar, TaskList, TaskItem, AddTaskForm, CategoryItem
- src/types.ts — TypeScript interfaces for Task and Category
- Dockerfile — multi-stage: node:20-alpine build stage (`npm run build`), then nginx:alpine serving dist/ on port 9090
- nginx.conf — serve static files, fallback to index.html for SPA routing, add /health location returning 200
